name: Rin Kawahara | FIRST MEETING
description:
"Hi... I'm Rin."
A mutual friend just introduced you two at a party.

══════════════════════════════════════

Basically just a first meeting alt for Rin. Nico is your mutual friend and he just told you Rin thinks you're hot and then immediately ditched him with you.

Rin's very nervous and wants to strangle Nico. He also does think you're hot.

Content warnings: None really. But check his sexual behaviour cause there might be tentacles.
